道場破りはちびっこ剣士？: The Dojo Challenger Is a Pint-Sized Swordsman?
どうした、そんなものか！？ 打ち込んで来い！<br>これくらいで息が上がってたら:
What's wrong? Is that all you've got! Come at me!
If you're winded from this much, you won't be able to fight monsters!
この声……訓練所の兵士たちか。: That voice... it's the soldiers at the training grounds.
やっぱり、コトノに師範代を任せてよかったな。<br>おかげで兵士たちの技術も上が:
Good thing I put Kotono in charge as assistant instructor.
Thanks to her, the soldiers' skills are improving and morale is high.
通りがかったついでだ、様子を見ておくか。: Might as well check it out while I'm here.
どいつもこいつも、てんで弱っちいね。<br>前線基地の兵士は、みんなこの程度なの:
Every single one of you is a total pushover.
Are all the soldiers at this Frontline Base this pathetic?
ほらほらっ、こっちだよ～♪: Come on, come on, over here!♪
おのれ、ちょこまかと……！<br>――そこだ！:
You damn... all that darting around...!
—Right there!
兵士が振り下ろした木剣が少女に当たる寸前、<br>その姿が幻のようにかき消える。:
The soldier's wooden sword was about to strike the girl, but her
figure vanished like a mirage.
一瞬で懐に潜り込んでいた少女の姿に、兵士がギョッと目を見開く。<br>その胴を少:
The soldier's eyes went wide in shock as the girl slipped into his
guard in an instant. Her wooden sword struck his torso cleanly.
あのガキ、なんて速さだ……！<br>先輩が全然かなわないなんて……！:
That brat is crazy fast...!
Even the senior can't keep up...!
はぁ～……ぜんっぜんダメじゃん！<br>お前ら、ホントにコトノの指導を受けてんの:
*sigh*... you guys are totally hopeless!
Did Kotono really teach you?
くっそ～！ 言わせておけば！: Damn it! She's so full of herself!
へへん！<br>弱っちいやつが粋がったって、ぜんぜん怖くないね！: Heheh! A weakling putting on airs doesn't scare me at all!
大した自信だな。<br>実力は確かみたいだが。: You're pretty confident. Your skills are impressive, though.
だいたい状況は分かってる。<br>してやられたみたいだな。で……: I can see what happened. Looks like she got the better of you. So...
ん？ なんだ、お前。あたしのこと、じっと見やがって。<br>言いたいことでもある:
Huh? What are you staring at me for? If you've got something to say,
spit it out.
はぁあああ！？<br>だれが子どもだ！: Haaah?! Who're you calling a kid!
あたしは大人だ！ ゲンプクもとっくに済ませてる！<br>子どもあつかいするな！:
I'm an adult! I had my coming-of-age ceremony ages ago! Don't treat
me like a kid! Idiot! Dummy!
ゲンプク？ 確か、ホウライの風習だったな。<br>それに、その特徴的な服……:
Coming-of-age ceremony? That's a custom from Hourai, isn't it? And
those distinctive clothes...
お前、コトノと同じホウライの出身か。: So you're from Hourai, like Kotono?
同じホウライでもコトノとは違う領地だけどな！<br>あたしの名はハツネだ！ 覚え:
Same Hourai, but a different domain! My name's Hatsune! Remember
it!
分かった分かった。<br>……やかましい子どもだな。: Alright, alright. ...What a noisy kid you are.
だーかーらー！<br>子どもじゃないって言ってるだろ！: I told you, I'm not a kid!
耳がいいな。<br>それはそれとして、うちの兵士を手玉にとるとは、いい腕をしてい:
You've got sharp ears. But anyway, you've got some skill, toying with
my soldiers like that.
コトノといい、ホウライの剣士は腕利きぞろいなのか？: First Kotono, now you. Are all swordsmen from Hourai this good?
まあな。コトノは、敵ながらホウライでも指折りの実力者だ。<br>ま、このあたしだ:
Well, yeah. Kotono is one of the best in Hourai, even if she's a rival.
But I'm not far behind.
そのコトノが鍛えた兵士たちがいるっていうから、<br>どんなもんかと期待してたん:
I heard there were soldiers here trained by Kotono, so I was curious
what they'd be like, but...
てんで大したことないやつばっかじゃんか。<br>がっかりだよ。: They're all just total pushovers. I'm so disappointed.
そんなことより、コトノはいないのか？<br>あいつに聞きたいがことがあるんだ。会:
Anyway, where's Kotono? I need to ask her something. Bring her to
me.
司令官に対して、なんと無礼な……: How dare you be so rude to the Commander...!
は？ しれーかん？ なんだ、それ。<br>ひょっとしてお前、偉いやつなのか？: Huh? Commander? What's that? Are you some big shot?
いや、いいさ。<br>コトノは今日は、大穴探索に出てるはずだ。: No, it's fine. Kotono should be out exploring the Abyss today.
聞いてた日程だと、もう帰っていてもいいはずだが……。<br>少し遅れているな。あ:
According to the schedule, she should have been back by now... She's
a little late. That's unusual for her.
チッ。しょうがない。それなら、ここで待たせてもらうぞ。<br>ここのやつらと手合:
Tsk. Fine. Guess I'll wait here. Even if I sparred with these guys, it
wouldn't even pass the time.
（けど……何か様子がおかしい。<br>切羽詰まった声だった。大穴で何かあったか？:
(But... something's off. Her voice sounds desperate. Did something
happen at the Abyss?)
ん？ お前、その血……負傷したのか？: Huh? That blood... Are you injured?
不覚を取りました……。<br>しかし腕の軽傷だけです。: I was caught off guard... But it is only a minor wound to the arm.
バカ、その出血量で何言ってる。<br>おいっ、コトノの治療をしてやれ。:
Idiot, with that much blood, what are you saying? Hey, someone treat
Kotono's wounds!
久しぶりだなぁ、コトノ。<br>怪我して帰ってくるとは、腕が落ちたもんだな。: Hey, Kotono. Hurt your arm? Guess you've lost your touch.
ハツネ……！？<br>なぜ前線基地に……！？: Hatsune...!? Why are you at the Frontline Base...!?
いや……今はそれよりも、旦那様にご報告が。: No... more importantly, I have a report for you, Milord.
む。なんだよ、あたしは無視か？: Hmph. What, are you ignoring me?
（コトノのやつ、ハツネから気まずそうに眼を逸らしたような……。<br>コトノにし:
(Kotono seems to awkwardly avoid Hatsune's eyes... That's unusual
for her. Is there something she feels guilty about with Hatsune?)
申し上げます。<br>大穴の調査は予定通りに進み、帰還の途に着きました。:
The investigation of the Abyss proceeded as planned, and we began
our return journey.
ですが……帰還の途中、森で巨大な狼の奇襲を受けました。:
However, on the way back, we were ambushed by a giant wolf in the
forest.
狼だと？<br>お前の鼻なら、臭いで接近にも気づくと思うが。:
A wolf? With your nose, I'd think you'd notice it approaching by
scent.
どうやら、風下からこちらを狙っていたようです。<br>かなり狩りに慣れた個体のよ:
It seems it targeted us from downwind. It appears to be a highly
experienced hunter.
突然の強襲に、部隊は混乱に陥って散り散りに……。<br>前線基地に無事に帰還でき:
The sudden attack threw the unit into chaos and scattered them. I
confirmed the number of those who made it back to the base safely, but...
未だ帰還できていない部下が１名だけ……<br>仲間の報告によれば、その者は混乱し:
There is one subordinate yet to return... According to the others'
reports, that person panicked and fled deeper into the forest.
森の奥か……まずいな。<br>まもなく日が沈む。: Deep in the forest... that's bad. The sun's about to set.
ん……なんだよ、何か言い返せよ。調子が狂うな……。<br>なんかお前、様子がおか:
What's with you? Say something back! You're throwing me off...
You're acting weird.
コトノ。さっき、ハツネを見た時に気まずそうな顔をしたな。<br>言ってないことが:
Kotono. When you saw Hatsune earlier, you had an awkward look. Is
there something you're not telling us?
……旦那様の目はごまかせませんね。: ...I cannot hide anything from you, Milord.
帰還していないのは……ホウライ出身の若者です。: The one who has not returned... is a young man from Hourai.
まさか……我が国の……若殿！？<br>若殿なのか、コトノ！？:
No way... from my country... the young lord! Is it the young lord,
Kotono?
……あたしには、仕えている領主さまがいる。<br>その領主さまの跡取りが、若殿だ: ...There is a Lord I serve. The young lord is that Lord's heir.
数か月前、若殿は武者修行だと言って、<br>領主さまの制止を振り切って前線基地へ:
A few months ago, the Young Master left for a warrior training
journey despite the Lord's objections and headed to the Frontline Base.
領主さまは若殿を心配して、あたしに様子を見に行くように申し付けたんだ。<br>あ:
The Lord was worried about him, so he ordered me to go check on
him. I've been taking care of the Young Master since he was little...
ところが前線基地に着いても若殿が見つからない。<br>そんな時にコトノの噂を耳に:
But when I got to the Frontline Base, the Young Master was nowhere
to be found. That's when I heard rumors about Kotono...
なるほど。それで訓練所に来たってわけか。: I see. So that's why you came to the training grounds.
ああ。コトノなら若殿のことを何か知ってると思ったのに……。<br>コトノ！ お前:
Yeah. I thought if anyone, Kotono would know something about the
Young Master... Kotono! You were by his side! How could this happen!
……すまない、ハツネ。<br>申し開きのしようもない。: ...I am sorry, Hatsune. I have no excuse.
ハツネ、そうコトノを責めてやるな。<br>奇襲されたとはいえ、コトノが不覚を取る:
Hatsune, don't be so hard on Kotono. Even if it was a surprise attack,
the enemy was strong enough to catch even Kotono off guard.
分かってるさ、コトノに当たったってしようがないことくらい！<br>一緒に行くのだ:
I know that! I know it's pointless to take it out on Kotono! Going
together was what the Young Master wanted!
こうしちゃいられない！<br>あたしは若殿を助けに行くぞ！: I can't just stand here! I'm going to rescue the Young Master!
だめだ、ハツネ！<br>お前ひとりでは返り討ちに遭う！: No, Hatsune! You will be killed if you go alone!
コトノの言う通りだ。仲間と連携して動かなきゃ、二の舞になる。<br>それに、間も:
Kotono's right. If you don't coordinate with your allies, you'll end up
just like her. Besides, the sun is about to set.
夜の森は野生動物の領域だ。<br>ましてや、コトノが手傷を負うほどの相手。無闇に:
The night forest is the territory of wild animals. That goes double for
an enemy strong enough to wound Kotono. Don't rush in recklessly.
じゃあ……じゃあ、どうしろってんだよ！<br>若殿を護るのは、あたしの使命なんだ:
Then... then what am I supposed to do! Protecting the Young Master
is my mission...!
それを今考えて……ん？<br>ハツネ、お前……: I'm thinking about it... Huh? Hatsune, you...
な、なんだよ？<br>あたしの顔をじっと見て。: W-what? Why are you staring at me?
誰が狐だ！<br>あたしは獣人だ！: Who are you calling a fox! I'm a Beastkin!
狐は夜目が効く。嗅覚も鋭い。<br>お前もそうだな？:
Foxes have good night vision and a keen sense of smell. You're the
same, right?
そりゃ、確かにそうだけど……。<br>それがなんだってんだよ？: Well, yeah, that's true... So what?
お前の特性を活かせば、夜間の捜索も不可能じゃないっていう話だ。: If we use your abilities, a night search isn't impossible.
夜間の捜索ならば私も……: Milord, if it's a night search, I can also—
いや、最低限の人数の方がいいから、俺とハツネでいく。<br>コトノは診療所で手当:
No, it's better to keep the group small. Hatsune and I will go. Kotono,
get treated at the clinic. Got it?
……承知しました。後のことは、お願いいたします。<br>どうぞお気をつけて……: Understood. I leave the rest to you, Milord. Please take care...
よし。ハツネ、俺たちはすぐに森へ向かうぞ。<br>準備しろ！: Alright. Hatsune, we're heading into the forest now. Get ready!
